repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc with error 'class optiling::Ca6k00188CustomTilingData has no member named set_*', do not use setter methods to assign tiling data; instead assign directly to the public fields (e.g., tiling.totalRows = totalRows).

When build fails in 02-build due to redefinition of 'Ca6k00045Custom' in op_proto.h caused by manual OP_ADD in host_tiling_src while autogen REG_OP already defines the operator, do not add a second registration with OP_ADD; instead remove the manual OP_ADD and rely solely on the autogen REG_OP.

repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: 84bb2c98 directly addresses the exact error seen: TilingFunc failure because the TilingData class (here Ca6k00147CustomTilingData) has no setter methods like set_totalLength. Its summary advises to avoid using setters and instead assign directly, which is the needed fix. 193e1ac4 is from the same ca6k operator family and involves host_tiling_src issues (redefinition due to manual OP_ADD vs autogen REG_OP); this provides relevant context that the tiling data structure may be autogenerated, further explaining why setters are unavailable.
